title: Define webhook event inbox
goal: Define an append-only event inbox contract for external notifications with source verification, idempotency, quarantine and replay before any direct state mutation is allowed.

metadata.safety_boundary: event ingestion only; no direct state transition

lease_scope_migration.rationale: The webhook inbox is an append-only Bureau state surface with source-verification and event schemas.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks

acceptance.assertion: External notifications are stored as append-only events before being interpreted by a reconciler.
Webhook inbox validates source identity, payload schema and event identity before storing an event as trusted input.
The contract covers event deduplication, replay window handling and quarantine for unverifiable payloads.
Stored events can be replayed idempotently in tests without duplicating final findings.
The inbox contract forbids direct task completion, merge or cleanup decisions.
